description: Large-corpus OKF exemplar generated from GOV.UK API Catalogue, data.gov.uk, Ordnance Survey, ONS and Department for Education GIAS public sources, with API-domain facets, typed relationships, search shards, and operational metadata.

okf-standards-crosswalk.v1.claim: Records carry DCAT/OpenAPI mappings and export-readiness gaps; the pack is not DCAT-AP RDF or complete OpenAPI without an exporter.

standards.role: Catalogue vocabulary for DataService, Dataset, endpoint, licence, publisher and provenance metadata.

standards.role: Application profile used to make DCAT catalogue records federatable across data portals.

standards.role: Executable HTTP API contract vocabulary for servers, paths, operations, schemas and security schemes.
standards.title: OpenAPI Specification

standards.role: Companion vocabulary for quality annotations where OKF metadata-quality signals need standards context.
standards.title: Data Quality Vocabulary

standards.role: Provenance model for harvest activity, source adapter and observation metadata.
